name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Mail Policy Violation
notes: Edit this BB to include anything you would consider to be a mail based policy violation.  An example might be outbound traffic on port 25 not originating from a mail server.

conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Policy.Mail Policy Violation
